issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

At the same time, a new tab sometimes opens showing the originally clicked content. After the initial visit the problem still appear sporadically on subsequent clicks. > > Steps to Reproduce > Open a new browser tab and navigate to lewdzone.com (first session visit). > Click any link, button, or image on the page. > Observe the current tab being redirected to a domain that the filter blocks. > Occasionally a second tab opens, loading the target URL that was originally clicked. > > Expected Behavior > The click should load the target page in the same tab and block opening an extra tab or popup page. > > Actual Behavior > Current tab redirects to a blocked domain. > A duplicate tab may open with the intended destination. > ### [NSFW] Screenshots [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3dgvx6zktagww4ococ8kcwcoko80kso1wdmmi12vgt.png?nc=1) ### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| Platform: | ublock origin v1.70 System version: | `windows 10` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).
